[Collect.anime.xyz](https://t.co/TJjc8MgDkJ) claw machine by is restocked again. New Grails added.  Azuki TCG discord tourney for new players: 29 entrants, 4+ hours of gameplay.
Azuki IP expansion is in full effect. Ask your local game store to order Azuki TCG today. Official Azuki TCG

Azuki TCG is now stocked through PHD Games and GTS Distribution. These two distributors put Magic, Pokémon, One Piece, and other major TCGs on shelves across the US. Want us at your shop on launch day? Tell your shop to preorder through PHD or GTS.
